title: Evaluation for Assistive Technology * Deafness - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Evaluation for Assistive Technology * Deafness 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL EARLY INTERVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on developing collaborative partnerships with parents and children that facilitate spoken language development through listening. Offers intensive auditory-oral intervention, on-site audiologist who does hearing aid analysis and cochlear implant mapping, regular home and school sessions, facilitated toddler groups with both children with typical hearing and children who are deaf and support and information for families. 2860 SE Holgate Boulevard Portland, OR 97202 Eligibility: Newborns to age 3 with a hearing impairment Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (503) 235-6551 Get Directions Visit Website More Details TUCKER MAXON SCHOOL EARLY INTERVENTION
